name: @moolam/sync-protocol
description: Internal component of Sutra SDK — applications should install sutra-sdk. The Contract. Framework-agnostic API boundary and CRDT state reconciliation for the Hybrid Cognitive Sync Protocol.

scripts.test: node smoke_test.mjs && node --test tests/wire_schemas.test.mjs tests/harness_frames.test.mjs tests/harness_stream_semantics.test.mjs tests/metering.test.mjs tests/metering_budget.test.mjs tests/meter_events_parity.test.mjs tests/degradation_registry.test.mjs tests/degradation_registry_export.test.mjs tests/degradation_stub_vectors.test.mjs tests/tool_envelope.test.mjs tests/tool_envelope_errors.test.mjs tests/tool_envelope_fixtures.test.mjs tests/golden_turns.test.mjs tests/export_schemas.test.mjs tests/schemas_committed.test.mjs tests/wire_parity_golden.test.mjs tests/arbitraries.test.mjs tests/merge_laws.test.mjs tests/golden_joins.test.mjs tests/advisories_unknown_concept.test.mjs tests/advisories_state_vector_regression.test.mjs tests/hlc_advisories.test.mjs tests/changelog_baseline.test.mjs tests/deprecation_policy.test.mjs tests/deprecation_advisory.test.mjs tests/sync_spans.test.mjs tests/sync_wire_headers.test.mjs tests/sync_advisories_spans.test.mjs
scripts.schemas:export: pnpm --filter @moolam/contracts run build && pnpm --filter @moolam/runtime run build && pnpm --filter @moolam/observability run build && pnpm run build && node scripts/export-schemas.mjs
